MINI MINUTES: Consolidated with Case No. CGC-16-549955. No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The Court orders the balance of the case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: Suzanne R. Bolanos; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
